nodes.label: Assigning a model to a slot

nodes.label: hal0 product identity
nodes.description: Open-source homelab AI inference platform; Apache-2.0; Linux + systemd; 'not another llama-server wrapper'

nodes.label: One-line installer
nodes.description: curl -fsSL https://hal0.dev/install.sh | bash; idempotent; non-interactive; HAL0_* env overrides

nodes.label: Proxmox VE LXC install script
nodes.description: One-liner on PVE host creates unprivileged Debian 13 LXC; --advanced for whiptail prompts; env-var overrides (CTID, RAM_MB, STORAGE…)

nodes.label: Free / zero cost
nodes.description: $0 + electricity; compare-table highlight vs. OpenAI cloud ($0.50–$60/M tokens)

nodes.label: No telemetry
nodes.description: 'No telemetry by default' pill in CTA; privacy-first positioning

nodes.label: Apache-2.0 license
nodes.description: Schema.org + CTA pills confirm Apache-2.0; permissive, open-source

nodes.label: OpenAI-compatible /v1/* API
nodes.description: Drop-in replacement at :8080/v1; works with Python openai, openai-node, LangChain, Cursor, Aider, LiteLLM unmodified

nodes.label: External upstream dispatcher
nodes.description: Registry-aware routing to OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, custom endpoints from one /v1/* surface

nodes.label: SSE streaming
nodes.description: Server-Sent Events for /v1/chat/completions; matches OpenAI streaming protocol exactly; stream:true flag

nodes.label: Slot-as-model addressing
nodes.description: model field accepts slot name ('primary') or exact registry ref (GGUF filename); dispatcher routes both paths

nodes.label: Structured API errors
nodes.description: Consistent error shape with type + message + slot context across all /v1/* endpoints

nodes.label: MCP tool annotations
nodes.description: 22 admin tools + 4 memory tools ship with MCP hint annotations (readOnly, destructive, idempotent, openWorld)

nodes.label: Slot concept
nodes.description: One inference workload = one systemd unit (hal0-slot@<name>.service) + one port on 127.0.0.1 + one lifecycle state machine

nodes.label: Slot lifecycle state machine
nodes.description: 9 states: offline → pulling → starting → warming → ready ↔ serving ↔ idle → unloading; atomic transitions persisted to state.json; SSE-streamed

nodes.label: Five built-in slots
nodes.description: primary (chat), embed (embeddings + rerank), stt (speech-to-text), tts (text-to-speech), img (image generation); undeletable from dashboard

nodes.label: Custom slot definition
nodes.description: Arbitrary additional slots beyond the five built-ins: second chat model, NPU slot, vision, ComfyUI; TOML-configured

nodes.label: Single-flight routing / dispatcher
nodes.description: Cold-cache prefetch coalesces thundering-herd requests into one HTTP call; registry-aware across local slots and external upstreams

nodes.label: Embed-rerank built-in slot
nodes.description: Auto-created bge-reranker-v2-m3 on :8086 with --reranking; /v1/rerankings separate from chat embeddings

nodes.label: Model registry
nodes.description: /var/lib/hal0/registry/registry.toml; on-disk TOML index of pulled + verified models; persists across updates; auto-regenerates on mutation

nodes.label: HuggingFace model pulls
nodes.description: POST /api/models/{id}/pull; FLM tags via flm pull; SHA-256 atomic install; progress streamed to dashboard

nodes.label: Capability slots overlay
nodes.description: User-facing embed/voice/img/NPU rollup controlled by /etc/hal0/capabilities.toml; one-click capability ops in dashboard

nodes.label: llama.cpp provider
nodes.description: Default chat/embed/rerank/vision provider; Vulkan (default), ROCm, CUDA backends; stateless build_env/start_cmd/health/infer interface

nodes.label: FLM / AMD XDNA NPU provider
nodes.description: FastFlowLM toolbox (ghcr.io/hal0ai/hal0-toolbox-flm:v1); chat + embed on AMD XDNA NPU; only surfaced when XDNA hardware present

nodes.label: Moonshine STT provider
nodes.description: Edge real-time ASR; CPU-only; /v1/audio/transcriptions; OpenAI Audio shape; 190 MB footprint

nodes.label: Kokoro TTS provider
nodes.description: 82M parameter model; 54 voices; 8 languages; CPU + Vulkan; /v1/audio/speech; 330 MB footprint

nodes.label: ComfyUI image generation provider
nodes.description: OpenAI-compatible /v1/images/generations via ComfyUI; ROCm; curated SDXL Turbo / SD 1.5 / Flux Schnell workflows

nodes.label: Provider ABC interface
nodes.description: build_env() / start_cmd() / health() / infer() — stateless, swappable; picker only shows backends the slot can honour on actual hardware

nodes.label: Strix Halo reference platform
nodes.description: Ryzen AI Max+ 395; Radeon 8060S iGPU; XDNA NPU; 128 GB LPDDR5X-8000 UMA; verified 258 tok/s concurrent; reference deployment

nodes.label: UMA-aware hardware probe
nodes.description: Detects iGPU, XDNA NPU, and unified memory pool; emits slot-fit warnings; writes /etc/hal0/hardware.json at install

nodes.label: Proxmox LXC deployment
nodes.description: Privileged LXC with iGPU + XDNA passthrough; AppArmor unconfined; PVEAuditor token for memory bar host-pressure segment

nodes.label: AMD discrete GPU (RX 7000)
nodes.description: 16–24 GB VRAM; Vulkan path works today; ROCm toolbox image in build queue; chat + embed functional

nodes.label: NVIDIA GPU (RTX 30/40/50)
nodes.description: CUDA llama.cpp; 10–32 GB VRAM; same slot lifecycle as other tiers; higher tok/s on small models vs. UMA

nodes.label: CPU-only fallback
nodes.description: Vulkan-CPU path; 0.5–4B practical model size; CI runs Qwen 0.5B; smoke tests; not the headline experience

nodes.label: Ryzen AI Max 385/390 (64 GB SKU)
nodes.description: Same install path as 128 GB SKU; 64 GB UMA; Q4 70B fits with tighter context windows

nodes.label: Coding loadouts
nodes.description: Three tiers: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B (~5 GB), Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B MoE (~19 GB), Qwen3-Coder-Next-80B-A3B (~47 GB)

nodes.label: Chat loadouts
nodes.description: Three tiers: Qwen3-4B 1M-ctx (~2.5 GB), Qwen3-30B-A3B MoE Strix daily-driver (~19 GB), Llama-4-Scout-17B 10M-ctx (~50 GB)

nodes.label: Voice mode loadout
nodes.description: Qwen3-4B + Moonshine base + Kokoro-82M; ~3 GB total; hands-free streaming; all slots hot simultaneously on 128 GB

nodes.label: RAG loadout
nodes.description: Qwen3-30B-A3B + bge-m3 (Q8, 8192-token ctx) + bge-reranker; /v1/rerankings; long-context retrieval; ~19 GB

nodes.label: Image generation loadout
nodes.description: sdxl-turbo (6.5 GB FP16, 4 steps) + sd-1.5-pruned alt + flux-schnell (23.8 GB, Apache-2.0) with Flux workflow

nodes.label: Agentic loadout
nodes.description: Hermes-4-70B (tool-call faithfulness) + bge-m3 + /mcp/admin + /mcp/memory; Cognee-backed memory; ~42 GB

nodes.label: Minimal / privacy-first loadout
nodes.description: gemma-3-1b-it (0.7 GB) + nomic-embed-text-v2-moe (140 MB MoE); CPU OK; <1 GB total

nodes.label: Vue 3 + Tailwind 4 admin dashboard
nodes.description: Dark-by-default operator console for running the box; SSE-backed status + log tail; capability cards; not a chat UI

nodes.label: Cosign-signed self-update
nodes.description: hal0 update --channel stable|nightly; atomic /usr/lib/hal0/current symlink swap; --rollback; GitHub OIDC keyless cosign verification

nodes.label: hal0 CLI
nodes.description: Single hal0 binary (Typer); all non-serve subcommands talk to daemon on 127.0.0.1:8080; hal0 doctor re-runs preflight

nodes.label: TOML configuration system
nodes.description: Atomic writes; schema-validated; hot-reload; /etc/hal0/hal0.toml (API/paths/upstreams/update) + capabilities.toml

nodes.label: journald logging + SSE log tail
nodes.description: All units log to system journal under stable unit names; dashboard tails over SSE; raw journalctl CLI access

nodes.label: Authentication & HTTPS (Caddy)
nodes.description: Default open on LAN; --auth=basic activates Caddy with basic_auth, Bearer tokens for API, HTTPS (Let's Encrypt / internal CA), Avahi mDNS

nodes.label: OpenWebUI bundled chat
nodes.description: Prewired chat UI on :3001; zero config; installer points it at local hal0 API automatically

nodes.label: Live TTFT dashboard
nodes.description: Per-slot time-to-first-token sampled in dispatcher; sparkline HUD on SlotCard; 60-second aggregation window

nodes.label: KV-cache % gauge
nodes.description: Synthesised kv_cache_usage = max(n_prompt_tokens) / n_ctx, clamped 1.0; /slots fallback when Prometheus gauge absent

nodes.label: Proxmox host-pressure memory segment
nodes.description: Read-only PVEAuditor token → memory bar shows DIMM total + muted segment for other-tenant + ZFS ARC + kernel pressure

nodes.label: FirstRun wizard
nodes.description: 8 linear steps (password → hardware → primary model → capabilities → HF token → license → install → done); guarded /firstrun route

nodes.label: Installer overhaul
nodes.description: ASCII banner + step counter + spinners; extracted preflight.sh; hal0 doctor; disk + port gates; hardware cards + slot pre-population; live-hello + QR

nodes.label: Signed release pipeline
nodes.description: releases.hal0.dev/stable.json via Cloudflare Pages middleware; v* tag → GH release → manifest in ~60s; cosign 3.x keyless

nodes.label: Toolbox container images
nodes.description: 6 images (vulkan, rocm, flm, moonshine, kokoro, comfyui) at ghcr.io/hal0ai/; pinned by sha256 in manifest.json

nodes.label: MCP host + server (roadmap)
nodes.description: hal0 speaks MCP both directions; compose tools across local slots + external MCP services; discover from dashboard

nodes.label: Cognee-backed memory (roadmap)
nodes.description: SQLite + LanceDB + Kuzu; shared default; X-hal0-Private:1 promotes writes to per-client namespace

nodes.label: Bundled Hermes agent app (roadmap)
nodes.description: Installable from dashboard; prewired to local OpenAI API + MCP servers

nodes.label: Approval inbox + bell
nodes.description: Destructive tool calls gate through header bell + modal inbox in dashboard; CLI parity via hal0 agent approvals

nodes.label: ChatOps adapters (roadmap)
nodes.description: Slack and Matrix bridges as extensions; chat to hal0 from existing rooms

nodes.label: LoRA hot-swap (roadmap)
nodes.description: Attach and rotate LoRAs against a warm base model without unloading underlying weights

nodes.label: Per-model rate limits and budgets (roadmap)
nodes.description: Cost-style accounting for local inference; cap a chatty agent without taking the whole box down

nodes.label: Benchmarks and presets UI (roadmap)
nodes.description: In-dashboard tok/s + latency runs; curated loadout presets to flash onto a fresh install

nodes.label: Extensions framework (roadmap)
nodes.description: Third-party apps as hal0 extensions: systemd unit + dashboard tile + healthcheck; bring-your-own-app, lifecycle-managed

nodes.label: AUR PKGBUILD and Ubuntu PPA (roadmap)
nodes.description: Native distro packages: pacman and apt as first-class install paths on top of the install script

nodes.label: Multi-host federation (roadmap)
nodes.description: Slot mesh across LAN boxes: primary on Strix Halo, embed on workstation, all behind one /v1/* surface

nodes.label: Voice mode end-to-end (roadmap)
nodes.description: Moonshine + agent loop + Kokoro stitched into hands-free streaming conversation, gated through slot lifecycle

nodes.label: hal0 vs. ollama comparison
nodes.description: 10-row table: hal0 wins on concurrent slots, state machine, UMA probe, NPU support, dispatcher, cosign updates, headless-first

nodes.label: hal0 vs. LM Studio comparison
nodes.description: LM Studio requires GUI; no slot lifecycle; no UMA probe; no NPU path; no cosign updates

nodes.label: hal0 vs. OpenAI cloud comparison
nodes.description: $0 + electricity vs. $0.50–$60/M tokens; your data on your hardware; no federation concept cloud-side

nodes.label: 258 tok/s concurrent performance
nodes.description: Verified: primary + embed concurrent on Strix Halo iGPU at ~9 GB GTT; measured on Ryzen AI Max+ iGPU + Vulkan

nodes.label: <200 ms dispatch latency
nodes.description: Verified: both slots hot, single-flight dispatch; measured on Strix Halo

nodes.label: Phi-3 Mini first-token latency
nodes.description: Verified: 2.39 GB pull in ~10s; 71 tok/s; 280 ms RTT; Strix Halo iGPU via Vulkan llama.cpp

nodes.label: Qwen 0.5B CI baseline
nodes.description: CI smoke model: 217–413 tok/s on Strix Halo; Qwen/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct-GGUF used in integration tests
